hooks.name: Pre-commit: whitespace and newline check
hooks.description: Rejects object files, spaces in filenames, missing trailing newline, and trailing whitespace.

hooks.name: Pre-push: protected branch guard
hooks.description: Blocks force-push/delete to protected branches and asks before pushing from protected branches.

hooks.name: Post-commit: copy latest commit hash
hooks.description: Copies latest commit hash after commit.
